role: Entry point and utility layer for the ArchSpine command-line interface, containing the command dispatcher, formatting helpers, and subcommand handler modules.
responsibility: Provides the CLI interface that parses user commands, dispatches them to dedicated handlers, and offers reusable utilities for output formatting, error handling, language prompts, help display, and interactive project initialization.

children.role: CLI utility module providing formatting, error handling, banner display, and help text wrapping for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
This directory contains all CLI command handler modules, each responsible for parsing and executing a specific subcommand of the ArchSpine tool.
CLI utility module that generates a list of document language choices for interactive configuration prompts, including a separator for high-capacity languages.
CLI help and dashboard display utility – provides formatted console output for the ArchSpine CLI dashboard and help commands.
CLI entrypoint and command dispatcher for the ArchSpine mirror system. Routes top-level commands to dedicated handler modules after setting up global HTTP proxy and environment configuration.
Handles the interactive initialization and bootstrap of a new ArchSpine project, encompassing repository setup, runtime configuration, and type definitions.
CLI adapter module for artifact strategy selection in repository initialization and configuration workflows.
